text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wanting to learn how to make great coffee,
Satono Diamond gets Manhattan Cafe to agree
to teach her.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I've really been looking forward to today!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Please don't mention it. Now, let's make some
delicious coffee.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The flavor of coffee differs depending on where
the beans are grown. The type of bean and
climate are both highly influential factors.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Finding the variety of beans you prefer is a
delight in its own... Please choose which ones you
would like to try...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
There are so many to choose from! I have no idea
which I'd like best.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
In that case... you may wish to create a coffee
blend. Your very own exclusive cup of coffee—it's
like embarking on an uncharted frontier...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Why, that sounds positively wonderful! I'll
challenge myself to create a blend!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
How about these ones from Honduras with a
chocolate aroma... And these passion
fruit-flavored ones too!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
That's ten kinds of beans you've chosen... I think
you ought to stop there...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...What? You think she might create some kind of
new flavor? I suppose that's true... Still...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: All right! I'll add this one too... and this one!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Time to try my own original blend! ♪

text_block_list.name: Dia & Cafe
text_block_list.text: Gulp, gulp!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Gack... It's like a maelstrom of bitterness and
sourness. I can't say that it tastes very good...
choice_data_list: Let's chalk this up as a failure...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...The more beans you add, the more complex the
flavor becomes. I think the different beans you
chose were fighting for supremacy.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I see... Hmm, then in order to ensure the different
flavors don't clash, I need...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Ah! You have some! This should help act as a
mediator between the flavors!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Ta-dah! A field full of vegetables!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
When cooking vegetables, you mix a whole bunch
together and stir-fry them or boil them in a big
pot, right?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
There are even teas made from roasting
vegetables, so I thought that maybe it could help
create harmony between the coffee flavors!
choice_data_list: I'm not sure that's such a good idea...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...I agree with Satono.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I never would have even thought to defy the
conventional wisdom surrounding coffee...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Cafe!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you'll create some fascinating coffee...
And my friend seems to agree.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I think so too! I can't even imagine what
this will end up like.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But that's all the more reason to take on this
challenge... Even if it doesn't end up tasting
good!
choice_data_list: How about learning the basics first?
Keep trying until you find success!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's a good suggestion... I should start by
building a solid foundation of knowledge.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Okay. I'll embark on my blending escapade only
once I have the basics down.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Now to pour in the hot water... And it's done!
Oh, but if I were to add in these beans too...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Um, I think you should stick to the recipe...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes, you're right! I need to do this properly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suppressing her curiosity, Satono Diamond
successfully brews some delicious coffee!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I hope you're looking forward to trying
it!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I see you've completed your... vegetable coffee.
With spinach and bell peppers... the coffee is a
deep green.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It practically smells green too...
W-well, down the hatch!

text_block_list.name: Dia & Cafe
text_block_list.text: Gulp, gulp!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: This... doesn't taste very good at all! Aha, ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: You're right about that... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The taste may leave much to be desired, but
Satono Diamond's coffee certainly brings smiles
to their faces!
